user.title: Météo Dynamique - New tracked position
user.description: Adds an instance that recomputes weather (Météo-France) from the current GPS position of the chosen person, tracker or zone. Add one instance per person to track, plus one for home (zone.home) if needed.

data.name: Name (e.g. Weather Christophe, Weather Home)
data.tracker_entity: Person, tracker or zone to follow

abort.already_configured: This entity is already tracked by an existing instance.
